title: pilosella piloselloides subsp. floccosa
intro: Pilosella piloselloides subsp. floccosa is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow flowers and astringent properties. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues due to its tannin content. The health benefits of Pilosella piloselloides subsp. floccosa include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and other gastrointestinal problems, as well as its antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
